scene.scenePrompt: Wide establishing shot of a modern corporate conference room in bright daylight, clean minimalist interior. A large whiteboard on the wall dominates the frame, with a precise red grid and typographic structures drawn on it. A sleek conference table sits in the foreground, with design papers and markers scattered. Sunlight streams through tall windows, casting sharp geometric shadows across the room. The atmosphere is tense and anticipatory, high-contrast lighting, black, white, and muted red color palette, vertical composition emphasis.

beats.narration: You have covered the whiteboard in the meeting room with rigorous grid lines using a red marker. The transitions, spacing, and center of gravity of every stroke are precisely marked. This is the order you believe in.
The door is pushed open, and a figure leans casually against the doorframe. He wears canvas shoes stained with paint, spinning a black marker in his hand.

activeCharacters.name: Lu Shi'an
activeCharacters.pose: Leaning against the doorframe, his eyes scanning you with playful scrutiny

beats.speaker: Lu Shi'an
beats.line: Yo, is this the legendary 'Typeface Prison'?
beats.lineDelivery: Tone is light and teasing, with a rising intonation at the end, as if admiring an interesting piece of art

activeCharacters.name: Lu Shi'an
activeCharacters.pose: Walking into the room, his gaze sweeping over the grid on the whiteboard, a slight smirk on his lips

beats.narration: Suppressing your annoyance, you tap the whiteboard with your fingertip.
beats.speaker: You
beats.line: This is the basic structure. The flow and spatial relationships of all strokes must be established here.

activeCharacters.name: Lu Shi'an
activeCharacters.pose: Hands in his pockets, tilting his head to look at you

beats.narration: He suddenly takes a step forward, grabs the black marker you left in the tray, and freehands the character for 'Love' right in the center of the perfectly symmetrical red grid you just drew. The strokes are wild, and ink splatters even land on your design drafts spread across the table.

activeCharacters.name: Lu Shi'an
activeCharacters.pose: Leaning forward, his arm sweeping as he leaves a messy yet vibrant character for 'Love' on the whiteboard

beats.narration: You freeze in place, staring at the black ink that has ruined all order, then look down at the splattered draft paper. A rush of blood goes straight to your head.
beats.speaker: You

activeCharacters.name: Lu Shi'an
activeCharacters.pose: Turning around to face you, a bright, unapologetic smile on his face

beats.speaker: Lu Shi'an
beats.line: Typefaces are meant to be felt, not measured.
beats.lineDelivery: Tone suddenly turning serious, looking straight into your eyes with unquestionable conviction

activeCharacters.name: Lu Shi'an
activeCharacters.pose: Putting down the marker, taking a step forward, his eyes burning with intensity

beats.speaker: You
beats.line: Ridiculous! This isn't artistic creation, it's work! Redraw it for me!

activeCharacters.name: Lu Shi'an
activeCharacters.pose: Raising an eyebrow, stepping closer instead of backing away

beats.speaker: You
beats.line: ...On what grounds? Just because of how you feel, you can dismiss all the rules?

activeCharacters.name: Lu Shi'an
activeCharacters.pose: The smile fading from his face, his eyes growing deep

characters.name: Lu Shi'an
characters.voiceDescription: Female, early 20s, with a cool, calm, and steady voice. Slightly detached but with underlying warmth. Rigorous and meticulous personality, pursuing perfection. Moderate to slow speaking pace, clear and powerful pronunciation. Standard Mandarin. Speaks with the characteristic logic and restraint of a designer.
characters.visualDescription: Modern Swiss graphic design style, vertical composition, early 20s, short asymmetrical ash-brown hair with subtle silver streaks, sharp intelligent grey eyes, clean minimalist features, confident and analytical expression, signature outfit: tailored black turtleneck sweater, crisp white high-waisted trousers, thin red geometric line accents on collar and cuffs, sleek black ankle boots, overall aura of precise, elegant, and focused professionalism, monochromatic palette with strategic red highlights

storyState.logline: You are a rigorous typeface designer forced to collaborate on a couple's font project with a free-spirited illustrator whose philosophy clashes with yours. When the finished work stuns the world, you find yourselves on the brink of breaking up due to your vastly different definitions of 'perfection'—but a secret hidden within the font file might change everything.
storyState.genreTags: Urban Workplace / Artistic Clash / Sweet Secret Crush / Twist Redemption
storyState.protagonist: You are a meticulous typeface designer who views typography as a belief; your work must be precise down to the millimeter. Right now, your boss has forced a project onto you: collaborating with a wild-styled illustrator to design a 'couple's font.' You detest losing control, but you fear a failed project affecting your career even more, so you can only grit your teeth and agree. Deep down, you have a secret: the reason you pursue perfect order so intensely is because you witnessed your father ruin his entire studio due to a single design error during your childhood.
storyState.castNotes: Lu Shi'an: A talented yet rebellious illustrator who firmly believes that 'inspiration trumps rules.' As your partner, he constantly disrupts your rhythm with unexpected actions, but you discover a surprising tenderness hidden within his lines. Director Shen: Your boss and mentor, swift and decisive but harboring selfish motives. On the surface, he pushes this project for company innovation, but in reality, he has other designs.
storyState.synopsis: As a rigorous typeface designer preparing to explain the font grid in the meeting room, you are interrupted by the intrusion of your new partner, illustrator Lu Shi'an. Ignoring your rules, he freehands a wild character for 'Love' over your perfect grid, sparking a fierce conflict as the two of you clash over the essence of typeface design.
openThreads: Why is Lu Shi'an so obsessed with 'feeling' rather than 'rules'?
With the grid and design drafts ruined by him, how will the project continue?
The hidden motive behind Director Shen forcing this person into the project.
relationships: Lu Shi'an: A first meeting with clashing philosophies, filled with tension, yet he displays an undeniable talent and attitude.
storyState.nextHook: Next Scene: Amidst the argument, he grabs your hand and pulls you toward the shadow of leaves under the sunlight outside the window, letting you observe the 'order within irregularity.' The conflict shifts into a subtle guidance and connection.

worldSetting:
This is an AI interactive story game geared towards a 【Female-oriented】 audience, featuring intense dramatic conflicts and rapid plot twists in the style of short videos.
Story Style: Multi-line twists. Pacing: Tight and exhilarating.
Opening setup for the featured story 'Typography of Love': She is a rigorous typeface designer, and he is a free-spirited illustrator. The two collaborate on designing a couple's font, sparking chemistry through the clashes of 'stroke structures' and the unspoken understanding of 'visual negative space.' However, once the font is completed, they face a crisis of separation due to differing design philosophies.
Please dive straight into this opening to give the player a strong sense of immersion and instant gratification; subsequent branches should maintain the twist density of a short drama, allowing players to see immediate consequences for every choice.
styleGuide: Modern Swiss graphic design style, vertical composition. A vertical minimalist composition featuring a high-contrast, stylized silhouette of a striking, attractive female face integrated with tall abstract geometric shapes and lines. Black, white, and red color palette, modern poster layout.
